name: Caesar Salad
recipeIngredient: Juice of 1 large lemon, about 3 tablespoons
recipeInstructions:
1. The night before: Tear off leaves from the lettuce. Wash well, dry thoroughly; don't bruise. Chill in refrigerator.
2. Crush the garlic clove, peeled. Let stand overnight in the olive oil. Chill in refrigerator.
3. Strain the olive oil to remove the garlic clove. Trim crusts from the French bread. Cut into cubes and brown in 1/4 cup of the olive oil. Drain on paper towels.
4. In a jar, add the remaining garlic-flavored olive oil the cayenne, Tabasco, sugar and the anchovies.
5. Break chilled romaine leaves into pieces and place in large bowl.
6. Sprinkle with pepper and salt.
7. Pour on the olive oil and mix thoroughly, so every leaf is shiny.
8. Boil the egg for 1 minute. Remove, crack shell, drop into salad.
9. Squeeze the lemon juice over the egg and stir gently into salad.
10. Just before serving, sprinkle the Parmesan cheese over the salad and add the croutons.
Serve with hot garlic bread.
